query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_metric_response (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    cycle           VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT         NOT NULL,
    clock           BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    metric_category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    object_type     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    request_body    JSON         NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_fmr_category (metric_category),
    KEY idx_fmr_time (from_time, until_time),
    KEY fk_fmr_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_metric_stat (
    id                  BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    metric_response_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    oid                 INT         NOT NULL,
    stat_time           BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    duration            INT         NOT NULL,
    values_json         JSON        NOT NULL,
    KEY idx_fms_oid_time (oid, stat_time),
    KEY idx_fms_response (metric_response_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fms_response FOREIGN KEY (metric_response_id) REFERENCES fact_metric_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_record_search (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    total           INT         NOT NULL,
    terminated_early BOOLEAN    NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    lookback_truncated BOOLEAN  NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    lookback_exceeded  BOOLEAN  NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    request_body    JSON        NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_frs_time (from_time, until_time),
    KEY fk_frs_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_frs_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_record (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    search_id       BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    record_id       VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    record_type     VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    appliance_uuid  VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    source_json     JSON         NOT NULL,
    KEY idx_fr_search (search_id),
    KEY idx_fr_type (record_type),
    KEY idx_fr_record_id (record_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fr_search FOREIGN KEY (search_id) REFERENCES fact_record_search(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_device_activity (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    activity_id     BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    device_id       INT         NOT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    stat_name       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE KEY uk_fda_activity (activity_id),
    KEY idx_fda_device_time (device_id, from_time),
    KEY idx_fda_stat (stat_name),
    KEY fk_fda_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fda_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fda_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_record_search (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    total           INT         NOT NULL,
    terminated_early BOOLEAN    NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    lookback_truncated BOOLEAN  NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    lookback_exceeded  BOOLEAN  NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    request_body    JSON        NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),

    KEY fk_frs_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_frs_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_record (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    search_id       BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    record_id       VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    record_type     VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    appliance_uuid  VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    source_json     JSON         NOT NULL,
    KEY idx_fr_search (search_id),
    KEY idx_fr_type (record_type),
    KEY idx_fr_record_id (record_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fr_search FOREIGN KEY (search_id) REFERENCES fact_record_search(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_device_activity (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    activity_id     BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    device_id       INT         NOT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    stat_name       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE KEY uk_fda_activity (activity_id),
    KEY idx_fda_device_time (device_id, from_time),
    KEY idx_fda_stat (stat_name),
    KEY fk_fda_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fda_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_fda_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
